what_results_support: 34/36 dataset-horizon cells have a non-GELU best activation
bounded/tanh-family activations have the strongest average ranks
what_results_do_not_support: claim of reproducing and surpassing original Informer Table 2
suggested_claim_revision: Under a matched Informer official-script protocol with complete three-seed coverage, activation choice is a dataset- and horizon-sensitive design variable. Bounded and tanh-family activations are strong static choices on average, but the full grid rejects a universal activation or deployable factor-router claim.
next_experiments_needed: targeted placement ablations on high-gain output-tanh ETT/ETTm cells
exact-protocol Lee-style variants before main-claim use
prospective held-out validation for factor-conditioned routing
